# Telluride Thermal

> Precision-engineered spray foam insulation for high-altitude mountain architecture in Telluride, Colorado. Serving San Miguel County since [year].

Telluride Thermal provides luxury-grade spray foam insulation solutions designed for the extreme climate of the San Juan Mountains. At 8,750+ feet elevation, standard insulation fails — their closed-cell and open-cell foam systems create airtight thermal barriers that withstand harsh winters, prevent ice dams, and reduce energy costs by up to 45%. Serving Telluride, Mountain Village, Placerville, Ophir, and surrounding San Miguel County.

## Services

- [Spray Foam Insulation](https://sprayfoaminsulationtelluride.com/services): Residential and commercial spray foam solutions including attic, crawlspace, and whole-wall applications
- [Attic & Roof Insulation](https://sprayfoaminsulationtelluride.com/services): High-R-value foam creates continuous air barrier at roofline to prevent ice damming
- [Crawlspace Sealing](https://sprayfoaminsulationtelluride.com/services): Moisture control and vapor barriers to protect foundations and keep floors warm
- [Commercial Insulation](https://sprayfoaminsulationtelluride.com/services): Industrial steel buildings, multi-family, cold storage, and warehousing solutions
- [High-Altitude Coatings](https://sprayfoaminsulationtelluride.com/services): Specialized UV-resistant coatings engineered for Telluride's extreme elevation and barometric conditions

## Service Areas

- [Telluride & Surrounding Mountains](https://sprayfoaminsulationtelluride.com/service-areas): Serving Telluride, Mountain Village, Placerville, Ophir, Sawpit, and all of San Miguel County

## Tools & Resources

- [Insulation ROI Calculator](https://sprayfoaminsulationtelluride.com/tools): Calculate heat retention, estimated annual savings, and recommended foam depth for your mountain home
- [Insulation Tips & Guides](https://sprayfoaminsulationtelluride.com/blog): Expert insights on high-altitude thermal performance, energy efficiency, and ice dam prevention for mountain architecture

- [Get a Quote](https://sprayfoaminsulationtelluride.com/contact): Submit a consultation request for residential or commercial projects

- Address: 674 Mountain Village Blvd, Telluride, CO 81435
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8am–6pm, Sat by Appointment

## Company

- Licensed, Bonded, and Insured
- Local specialists familiar with San Juan Mountains terrain and building codes
- Thermal imaging and on-site assessments available
